method: Block-bootstrap of canonical climate formula L1 amplitudes. ECS(n) = ΔT(n) × ΔF₂ₓ / ΔF(n); ΔT = A_d18o × κ; ΔF = 5.35 ln(1 + A_co2/CO₂_ref). Signed lag from phase difference (positive = CO₂ lags T). ESS→Charney via Charney = ESS × (1 - α_slow).

pairs.label: Full Cenozoic (CENOGRID δ¹⁸O 0–67 Ma  ↔  CenCO2PIP CO₂ 0–66 Ma)
